title: Iasi Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Iasi with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Iasi are characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a critical level of heat wave alert issued. 
 The temperature is expected to remain high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.5 GG, indicating a significant energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 25%, and the wind speed is moderate at 17.1 km/h, which may provide some relief but not enough to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
